title: Starlight Video
about: This video was used as a promotional piece for the Starlight Square in Cambridge, MA, seeking to raise $100K to turn a parking lot into a permanent space for events and vendors. Over 400 pictures were used in this video to show the success of the program before, and highlight the value it brings to the community

title: Cambridge Community Mural Documentary
about: I filmed, directed, and edited this documentary showing the development of a mural made on the inner wall of my high school. I also participated in making the mural. This project required over 200GB of footage over 5 months of filming. I learned how to compose shots, build a narrative, and remain patient when holding a camera, especially as the subject matter is constantly changing.
